scripts.build: bun run check-slugs && bun run check-generated && bun run build.ts
scripts.build:data: bun run build/pipelines/ai-daily.pipeline.ts && bun run build/pipelines/uni-news.pipeline.ts && bun run build/pipelines/uni-events.pipeline.ts && bun run check-generated
scripts.build:ai-daily: bun run build/pipelines/ai-daily.pipeline.ts && bun run check-generated
scripts.build:uni-news: bun run build/pipelines/uni-news.pipeline.ts && bun run check-generated
scripts.build:uni-events: bun run build/pipelines/uni-events.pipeline.ts && bun run check-generated
scripts.dev: bun run build.ts && bun run render:posters && bun run serve
scripts.sync: bun run check-slugs && bun run check-generated && bun run build.ts && bun run sync-to-db.ts
